message:
feat(fsqlite-parser, fsqlite-btree): refine SQL lexer token handling and add B-tree cursor support

Lexer refinements (lexer.rs, token.rs):
- Expand token classification to support new expression and statement forms
- Improve keyword recognition and operator tokenization
- Add module-level declarations for tighter integration with expression parser

B-tree cursor (cursor.rs):
- Add cursor navigation support for B-tree page traversal

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
